environment_runtime: Crafter via Modal-hosted Synth-compatible containers/crafter_rs service
training_backend: Custom sequence-level GRPO-style LoRA loop in src/nanohorizon/rlvr_training.py
inference_backend: Clustered Modal vLLM runtime forwarded from the learner-owned rank-1 worker
reproducibility: Reference runner is ./scripts/run_crafter_rlvr_qwen35_4b_2xa100_20min.sh with user edits confined to src/nanohorizon/rlvr_training.py.
